note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Venous Left lower leg measures aprx 3.5 x 5.4cm, depth 0.7cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 2.1x3.2, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 3.5x5.4x0.7cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 57% gran, 43% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Oduya notified.
